Created attachment 189879
Update cacti to 1.1.31

Update cacti to 1.1.31

This update does not reference any CVEs so no merge-quarterly required.
Committer: please ignore the portlint warnings regarding gettext.  Cacti has internal gettext support.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.4/11.1 i386/amd64 at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.31/
